name: Rana Sugars Limited
summary: Rana Sugars Limited manufactures and sells sugar, molasses, and bagasse in India. It operates through three segments: Sugar Manufacturing, Ethanol Manufacturing, and Power Generation. The company offers double refined white sulphurless, plantation white, and raw sugar, as well as sugar from sugar beet. It also produces power from bagasse; manufactures various grades of alcohol, such as rectified spirit and potable grade extra neutral alcohol, as well as liquor; and offers sugar beet pulp as cattle feed. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Chandigarh, India.
